name: USearch (Unum Vector Search)

performance.notes: Faster than FAISS for HNSW; 10x smaller memory footprint; hardware-optimized SIMD

agent_readiness.notes: High-performance vector search library with hardware-optimized SIMD kernels. Faster than FAISS for HNSW search. 10x smaller memory footprint through quantization. Supports f32, f16, i8 quantization. Python, JavaScript, C, Rust, Java, Golang bindings. Persistent index. Supports custom metrics. Used in production at scale. Also includes StringIndex for fuzzy string search. Modern FAISS alternative with better ergonomics and memory efficiency.

gotchas: Still not a full vector database
best_when: Memory-efficient ANN search (10x vs FAISS via quantization)
summary: USearch is a high-performance HNSW vector search library with hardware-optimized SIMD kernels. Faster than FAISS for HNSW search with 10x smaller memory footprint via quantization. Python, JavaScript, Rust, Go bindings. Persistent index. Better ergonomics than FAISS. Best when memory efficiency matters (edge, mobile, large-scale ANN without full vector DB overhead).
